name: Sweet Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes as directed and simmer in lightly salted water until slightly tender.
2. Drain quickly and return the potatoes to the pot.
3. Cover with a dish towel and allow them to steam in their own heat and juice until completely cooled to room temperature. This will produce perfect boiled potatoes every time.
4. Once the potatoes have reached room temperature, mix all ingredients together and chill overnight or for at least 4 hours.
5. Do not add the mayonnaise-type salad dressing to warm potatoes!
